calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Susie McAllister and Alema Hoskins are present.
Attorney John DiBene representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge pro tem Amanda Fischer and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-31-2011 is vacated.
